revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-550

Apparatus which enables luminous flux to be determined by a single comparison.


Note 1: The most commonly used form of integrating photometer is the Ulbricht sphere with associated photometric equipment.

Reference: C.I.E.


Note 2: In Britain, the term Photometric Integrator is also sometimes employed with the same meaning.

{{IALAFooter}}
